transcript: Speaker A: All right, we are going to be hablando some español today. Let's go, Duolingo. All right, okay. Cómo está, señor, right? That should be... Yes! All right, okay, perfect. Carmen, estás mal. Yes? Oh, wait, no, cansada. All right, okay, let's lock in. We got this. Okay, sí, yo comes español. I speak Spanish. Wait, my... yo hablo. All right, Duolingo, you made your point. I got to learn some more.
on_screen_text: What would you like to learn? For English speakers: Spanish, French, German, Italian. CONTINUE. Translate this sentence: How are you, sir? está, estoy, cansada, señor, bien, se llama. CHECK. Incredible! Translate this sentence: Carmen, are you tired? estoy, cansada, mal, señorita, señora, Carmen. Incorrect. Correct Answer: Carmen, ¿estás cansada? Keep trying! Translate this sentence: Yes, I speak Spanish. español, comes, hablo, buenas noches, yo, bien. Incorrect. Correct Answer: Sí, yo hablo español. can you do better? duolingo. Learn a language for free! PLAY NOW.
summary: A presenter records himself playing Duolingo to learn Spanish, making a few humorous mistakes. The ad highlights the interactive and corrective nature of the app's language lessons. It ends with a call to action encouraging viewers to learn a language for free.
